PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Petition To Terminate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-10-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Continued To Jan-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Rachel Rosenfeld, via Zoom, for Agnes Dimitrou, Personal Representative.

The court acknowledges counsel's written responses to the Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause issued by the court following the calling of this matter on Oct-19-2022 and excuses the appearance of the Personal Representative at today's hearing. Counsel report of having a Petition to Terminate Proceedings Due to Lack of Assets drafted and is in the process of having her client sign the Petition and will file it immediate afterwards. Counsel offers additional testimony regarding the status of the Estate which necessitated the filing of the forthcoming the Petition to Terminate. The court advises counsel that it will be continuing this matter to allow for the filing of the Petition to Terminate but reminds counsel that the court will be expecting the filing of either that petition or a Petition to Approve Status of Administration, by the next calling.

The Order to Appear is taken off calendar and the court discharges the Order to Show Cause. The matter is continued to Jan-10-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. A Status on Filing of Petition to Terminate is added for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nazaruz. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-06-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-19-2022 Continued To Dec-06-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court notes that today's status hearing date was indicated in the court's order appointing Executor dated Aug-23-2021. An Order to Appear will be issued to Executor Agnes L. Dimitriou and Attorney Rachel H. Rosenfeld to appear on Dec-06-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An Order to Show Cause why the court should not order Executor Agnes L. Dimitriou and Attorney Rachel H. Rosenfeld to pay sanctions up to $250 each for failure to appear is set for the same date. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lozada. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexis Dimitriou appeared in court in Propria Persona.

Mr. Dimitriou stated that he does not object to the appointment of his mother, but he has concerns about his mother's competency, raised the issue of his brother using his father's license to practice law and informed the Court that there is a pending case against his brother. Mr. Dimitriou also stated that he lives in Greece, that he was not given notice of this petition and that he found out about the case by checking the court's records. In addition, Mr. Dimitriou stated that it seems as if his mother is struggling to keep up with things, that there is an issue with needing to sell a building in Greece, that there is an issue the way his father's name appears on the death certificate and that his father has a tax issue in Greece. There being no objections by anyone, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 26, 2012 is admitted to probate. Agnes L. Dimitriou is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 19, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution is filed before October 12, 2022, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
